meaning: n.(伊斯兰教国家的)医师,学者
examples: But that's not what Hakim wants, as she noted in an academic paper published last year.
Feminists who want women to throw away their femininity are overlooking a powerful asset, Ms Hakim argues.
Ms Hakim suggests that women have more erotic capital than men to start with, mainly because they have had to work at it for centuries.
Al-Sadr's chief Shiite political rival, Abdul Aziz al-Hakim, said that only Iraqis should control Iraq.
Mr Hakim said he did not believe that hand transplants would become very common.
